search.query: objectRef.namespace:*  NOT  user.username: node NOT  user.username: serviceaccount NOT  user.username: apiserver NOT  user.username: kube-scheduler NOT  user.username: kube-controller-manager     | SELECT count(DISTINCT "objectRef.namespace")
search.tokenQuery: objectRef.resource : ${ResourceType} and objectRef.namespace:*  NOT  user.username: node NOT  user.username: serviceaccount NOT  user.username: apiserver NOT  user.username: kube-scheduler NOT  user.username: kube-controller-manager     | SELECT count(DISTINCT "objectRef.namespace")

search.query: NOT  user.username: node NOT  user.username: serviceaccount NOT  user.username: apiserver NOT  user.username: kube-scheduler NOT  user.username: kube-controller-manager     | SELECT  round(sum(case when "responseStatus.code" < 400 then 1 else 0 end) *100.0 / count(1), 2)
search.tokenQuery: objectRef.resource : ${ResourceType}   NOT  user.username: node NOT  user.username: serviceaccount NOT  user.username: apiserver NOT  user.username: kube-scheduler NOT  user.username: kube-controller-manager     | SELECT  round(sum(case when "responseStatus.code" < 400 then 1 else 0 end) *100.0 / count(1), 2)

search.query: NOT  user.username: node NOT  user.username: serviceaccount NOT  user.username: apiserver NOT  user.username: kube-scheduler NOT  user.username: kube-controller-manager     | SELECT  count(DISTINCT verb)
search.tokenQuery: objectRef.resource : ${ResourceType}   NOT  user.username: node NOT  user.username: serviceaccount NOT  user.username: apiserver NOT  user.username: kube-scheduler NOT  user.username: kube-controller-manager     | SELECT  count(DISTINCT verb)

search.query: verb : create or verb : patch or verb : update or verb : put or verb:delete | select DISTINCT ( case when "objectRef.namespace" is null then '__all__' else "objectRef.namespace" end )  as ns  HAVING ns != '__all__'  limit 10000

chartQueries.query: (verb : get or verb : list or verb : watch )    NOT  user.username: node NOT  user.username: serviceaccount NOT  user.username: apiserver NOT  user.username: kube-scheduler NOT  user.username: kube-controller-manager     | SELECT CASE WHEN  "objectRef.namespace" is null then '__all__' else "objectRef.namespace" end as  ns, count(1) as total  from log   group by ns

search.query:
(verb : update or verb : put or verb : patch )  NOT  user.username: node NOT  user.username: serviceaccount NOT  user.username: apiserver NOT  user.username: kube-scheduler NOT  user.username: kube-controller-manager     | SELECT auditID as "事件ID", date_format(from_unixtime(__time__), '%Y-%m-%d %T' ) as "操作时间", "requestURI" as "资源", "responseStatus.code" as "状态码",
 CASE WHEN "user.username" != 'kubernetes-admin' then "user.username"
 WHEN "user.username" = 'kubernetes-admin' and regexp_like("annotations.authorization.k8s.io/reason", 'RoleBinding') then regexp_extract("annotations.authorization.k8s.io/reason", ' to User "([^"]+)"', 1) ELSE 'kubernetes-admin' END  
 as "操作账号", 
CASE WHEN json_array_length(sourceIPs) = 1 then json_format(json_array_get(sourceIPs, 0)) ELSE  sourceIPs END
as "源地址" order by "操作时间" desc

objectRef.resource : ${ResourceType} and (verb : update or verb : put or verb : patch )    NOT  user.username: node NOT  user.username: serviceaccount NOT  user.username: apiserver NOT  user.username: kube-scheduler NOT  user.username: kube-controller-manager     | SELECT auditID as "事件ID", date_format(from_unixtime(__time__), '%Y-%m-%d %T' ) as "操作时间", "requestURI" as "资源", "responseStatus.code" as "状态码",
 CASE WHEN "user.username" != 'kubernetes-admin' then "user.username"
 WHEN "user.username" = 'kubernetes-admin' and regexp_like("annotations.authorization.k8s.io/reason", 'RoleBinding') then regexp_extract("annotations.authorization.k8s.io/reason", ' to User "([^"]+)"', 1) ELSE 'kubernetes-admin' END  
 as "操作账号", 
CASE WHEN json_array_length(sourceIPs) = 1 then json_format(json_array_get(sourceIPs, 0)) ELSE  sourceIPs END
as "源地址" order by "操作时间" desc

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: (verb : update or verb : put or verb : patch )    NOT  user.username: node NOT  user.username: serviceaccount NOT  user.username: apiserver NOT  user.username: kube-scheduler NOT  user.username: kube-controller-manager     | SELECT CASE WHEN  "objectRef.namespace" is null then '__all__' else "objectRef.namespace" end as  ns, count(1) as total  from log   group by ns
chartQueries.tokenQuery: (verb : update or verb : put or verb : patch )    NOT  user.username: node NOT  user.username: serviceaccount NOT  user.username: apiserver NOT  user.username: kube-scheduler NOT  user.username: kube-controller-manager     | SELECT CASE WHEN  "objectRef.namespace" is null then '__all__' else "objectRef.namespace" end as  ns, count(1) as total  from log   group by ns

chartQueries.tokenQuery: (verb : delete)  | SELECT CASE WHEN  "objectRef.namespace" is null then '__all__' else "objectRef.namespace" end as  ns, count(1) as total  from log   group by ns

search.query:
* NOT  user.username: node NOT  user.username: serviceaccount NOT  user.username: apiserver NOT  user.username: kube-scheduler NOT  user.username: kube-controller-manager | select "操作账号" from (  select  CASE 
 WHEN "user.username" != 'kubernetes-admin' then "user.username"
 WHEN "user.username" = 'kubernetes-admin' and regexp_like("annotations.authorization.k8s.io/reason", 'RoleBinding') then regexp_extract("annotations.authorization.k8s.io/reason", ' to User "([^"]+)"', 1)
 ELSE 'kubernetes-admin' END  
 as "操作账号", count(1) as total  from log where regexp_like("user.username", '^[\w\-_]+$') group by "操作账号"   HAVING "操作账号" != 'kubernetes-admin' order by total desc  limit 100)

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: level: RequestResponse  NOT  user.username: node NOT  user.username: serviceaccount NOT  user.username: apiserver NOT  user.username: kube-scheduler NOT  user.username: kube-controller-manager   |  select case when "ActionType" is null then '无' else "ActionType" end as "ActionType", "t", count from (SELECT time_series(__time__, '1h', '%y-%m-%d %H', '0') as t, verb as ActionType, count(1) as count from log group by t, verb   order by t  limit 10000) limit 10000
chartQueries.tokenQuery: level: RequestResponse  NOT  user.username: node NOT  user.username: serviceaccount NOT  user.username: apiserver NOT  user.username: kube-scheduler NOT  user.username: kube-controller-manager   |  select case when "ActionType" is null then '无' else "ActionType" end as "ActionType", "t", count from (SELECT time_series(__time__, '1h', '%y-%m-%d %H', '0') as t, verb as ActionType, count(1) as count from log group by t, verb   order by t  limit 10000) limit 10000
